description_long: This kiosk features a unique design with a series of vertical slats forming its main structure, each slat displaying a portion of a large printed image. The images on the slats change depending on the viewing angle, with one side showing a labyrinth garden and the other side depicting a modern architectural building. The frame appears to be constructed from a dark, weathered metal or wood, giving it a sturdy and industrial look. The slats are evenly spaced and mounted within the frame, creating a visually dynamic effect as one moves around the kiosk. Two thin support poles extend downward, suggesting the kiosk is intended to be installed into the ground, such as in a park or along a sidewalk. The overall appearance is modern and artistic, likely serving as an informational or decorative urban installation.
description: A modern kiosk with vertical slats displaying alternating images, set in a dark, sturdy frame with ground supports. The design is visually dynamic and artistic, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thin profile of the kiosk and the alignment of the vertical slats.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the labyrinth garden image displayed across the slats, framed by the dark structure.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the slimness and depth of the slats.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a modern architectural building image across the slats, contrasting with the front image.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign integrated into vertical slats, displaying large images on both sides; no visible text or symbols.
attribute_roof_design: flat top frame with no overhang or decorative elements, matching the industrial style of the structure.
attribute_architectural_style: modern with industrial and minimalist influences
